name: agent-docs
description: Use for AGENT DOCS — the agent-NATIVE documentation an AI agent reads and acts on (no human reads the page). DO — write or fix an AGENTS.md, llms.txt, tool description, machine-readable reference, or context-budget surface. REVIEW — audit an agent-native doc surface for findability, chunk survivability, trigger clarity, and budget, then score it. DESIGN — shape an AGENTS.md contract, a curated llms.txt index, tool descriptions, machine-readable reference, or context-budget tiers, or explain a principle. Triggers on 'audit our AGENTS.md', 'curate our llms.txt for agents', 'why does the agent call the wrong tool', 'will this doc survive retrieval/chunking', 'what should an agent load vs retrieve'. Do NOT use for human or dual-audience docs, README, help, or RAG-for-human-search (use docs-audit / docs-design), the typed tool/SDK schema as code (use agent-dx), scaffolding or enforcing repo hooks/gates (use harden-repo-for-coding-agents), or operating an agent system (use agent-ops).

inspired_by.name: Agent Skills overview
inspired_by.author: Anthropic
inspired_by.contribution: Progressive disclosure for agent-readable instructions — metadata always loaded, instructions on trigger, resources on demand — grounding the context-budget tiers and the AGENTS.md-as-lean-contract discipline.

inspired_by.name: MCP Tool Descriptions Are Smelly!
inspired_by.author: Harsha Hasan
inspired_by.contribution: Evidence that tool-description quality changes agent task success and that more description can regress behavior when it is not targeted — the basis for tool-description clarity and disambiguation.

inspired_by.name: Evaluating repository-level context files for coding agents
inspired_by.author: Gloaguen
inspired_by.contribution: Always-loaded context files must be minimal and measured; autogenerated context dropped task success and inflated cost, grounding the do-not-autogenerate marker and the everything-dump anti-pattern.

inspired_by.name: The llms.txt file proposal
inspired_by.author: Jeremy Howard
inspired_by.contribution: A curated, agent-facing entry-point index and full-markdown rendering convention — the basis for the curated-index and placement-by-access-pattern heuristics.

metadata.catalog_summary: Agent-as-reader: the agent-native documentation an AI agent reads and acts on — DO (write/fix an AGENTS.md, llms.txt, tool description, machine-readable reference, or context budget), REVIEW (audit findability, chunk survivability, trigger clarity, and budget, then score it), DESIGN (shape the AGENTS.md contract, curated index, tool descriptions, reference, or budget tiers). Narrowed to agent-native artifacts; human/dual-audience docs stay in docs-audit / docs-design.
